mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audio_tasks (user_id, source_text, speed, noise_type, noise_factor, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceText}, #{speed}, #{noiseType}, #{noiseFactor}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM audio_tasks WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM audio_tasks WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{before}
